quality.description_clarity: High. Clearly defines usage, effect, and limitations.
quality.mechanical_completeness: Good. Defines action economy (Action to open/close), primary effect (portal creation), outcome randomness (GM decides destination), and cooldown (1d8 hours).

mechanics.action_economy: Action to open, Action to close.
mechanics.primary_effect: Creates a two-way portal to another world/plane.
mechanics.cooldown: 1d8 hours after a portal is opened.

suggested_refinements: Specify if closing the portal requires concentration or if it is instantaneous upon folding.
Clarify the visual appearance/size of the resulting portal.
